testimonials.title: Transformed lives
testimonials.description: Listen to the stories of people whose lives have been transformed by Christ's love in our community.

beliefs.title: Our Beliefs
beliefs.description: Learn about the fundamental principles of our faith
beliefs.pageDescription: We base our faith on the Word of God. We believe in one God, creator of the universe, manifested in three persons: Father, Son, and Holy Spirit.

biblia.title: The Bible
biblia.subtitle: Our foundation
biblia.longDescription: We believe that the Bible is God's message to humanity. Both the Old and New Testaments were inspired by Him and contain no errors in their original writings. It is the complete revelation of His will to save us and the final authority that guides our life, our faith, and our conduct. Therefore, we believe that its message is closed: nothing can be taken away or added to it.

trinidad.title: God
trinidad.subtitle: One in three persons
trinidad.longDescription: We believe in one eternal God who exists in three persons: the Father, the Son, and the Holy Spirit. Although they are three, they are one God with the same nature, the same attributes, and the same perfection. Therefore, all three deserve the same respect, trust, and obedience from us.

jesucristo.title: Jesus Christ
jesucristo.subtitle: God made man
jesucristo.longDescription: We believe that Jesus Christ is fully God and fully man at the same time. He already existed from eternity as God, but became man when conceived by the Holy Spirit and born of a virgin, without ceasing to be divine. He died on the cross as the perfect sacrifice in our place, rose on the third day, and ascended to heaven. Today, from there, He acts as our defender and representative before God while we await His return.

espirituSanto.title: The Holy Spirit
espirituSanto.subtitle: Our guide
espirituSanto.longDescription: We believe that the Holy Spirit is the third person of the Trinity. His work is to give glory to Jesus and help people recognize their sin and their need for God. When someone trusts in Jesus, the Spirit transforms them and unites them to the Church at that very moment. In addition, He lives in the believer to guide them, teach them, and give them the strength to live a life that pleases God.

salvacion.title: Salvation
salvacion.subtitle: An eternal gift
salvacion.longDescription: We believe that when someone trusts in the Lord Jesus Christ and His work, they immediately pass from spiritual death to life. At that moment, God accepts them and declares them righteous, just as He accepts Jesus Himself. This union with Christ is forever. We are saved solely by His sacrifice on the cross. By believing, we are born again and sealed by the Holy Spirit, trusting that God always keeps His promises.

humanidad.title: Human Beings
humanidad.subtitle: Our condition
humanidad.longDescription: We believe that we were created in God's image, but sin separated us from Him. As a result, humanity lost its spiritual connection with God and fell under total depravity, which means we are spiritually unable to save ourselves. This condition is transmitted to the entire human race, with Jesus Christ being the only exception.

regresoCristo.title: The Return of Christ
regresoCristo.subtitle: Our hope
regresoCristo.longDescription: We believe that after a time of great difficulty in the world (the great tribulation), the Lord Jesus Christ will return physically and personally. He will come with all His power and glory to establish His thousand-year kingdom (the Millennium), defeat evil, restore Creation from its current suffering, fulfill His promises to Israel, and be recognized by the whole world as God.

resurreccion.title: The Resurrection
resurreccion.subtitle: The eternal future
resurreccion.longDescription: We believe that all people who have died will return to physical life. Those who trusted in God will be resurrected to live in eternal joy with Him. On the other hand, those who rejected His love will be resurrected to face judgment and conscious, eternal separation from God.

iglesia.title: The Church
iglesia.subtitle: A united family
iglesia.longDescription: We believe that the Church is not a place, but the union of all people who have been transformed by the Holy Spirit through faith. The moment someone receives Christ in their heart, they become part of this great spiritual family that we call the 'universal church.'

bautismoSantaCena.title: Baptism
bautismoSantaCena.subtitle: and the Lord's Supper
bautismoSantaCena.longDescription: We believe that Jesus left us two special ceremonies: water Baptism and the Lord's Supper. We want to be clear: participating in them does not save us, but they are very important means to publicly witness our faith and remember Jesus' sacrifice for us.

matrimonio.title: Marriage
matrimonio.subtitle: God's design
matrimonio.longDescription: We believe that marriage is a sacred institution created by God from the beginning. According to what He commands in the Bible, marriage is the exclusive and faithful union between one man and one woman. This divine design is intended to reflect Christ's love for His Church, provide mutual companionship, and be the foundation for the family.

estiloVidaCristiana.title: A holy life
estiloVidaCristiana.subtitle: The Christian lifestyle
estiloVidaCristiana.longDescription: We believe that we have been called to live in a holy way, guided by the Spirit of God and not by our selfish impulses. Although while we are in this world we will continue to struggle with our human nature (the flesh), our goal is to submit every area of our life to Christ's control with the help of the Holy Spirit.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Learn about our history and mission
about.pageDescription: We are a faith community committed to Christ's love. Discover our history, mission, and the values that guide us every day.

past.title: The Past:
past.content1: The history of Terres de l'Ebre Church does not begin in a large building, but in the warmth of a home. The church was born in the town of Xerta, near Tortosa. In those early days, meetings were held simply in the pastor's house with his family. Shortly after, other members who shared the same vision joined, also opening their homes to study the Bible. They were driven by a clear purpose: to grow together in God's Word and form a community in an area where there were no churches with a sound and solid doctrinal foundation.
past.badge1: A name with purpose: Light in the territory
past.content2: It was precisely that vision that gave identity to the congregation. The name Biblical Church Terres de L'Ebre was decided because the goal is to be a spiritual light throughout the territory. The church's desire is for the Gospel message to shine in every corner of the region, bringing hope to every neighboring community
past.badge2: A step of faith: Towards Tortosa
past.content3: Over the years, it was seen how God made that small group grow. A time came when the houses became too small and the need to take a step forward was understood. With the intention of being in a more central location that would be easily accessible to those who needed it, the decision was made to move to Tortosa. That step was taken in a way that can only be explained by faith: a place was rented without having the necessary money, but with full confidence that God would provide. That's how meetings began in Tortosa and, little by little, the church consolidated until it became what it is today.

present.title: The Present:
present.content: Currently, the church attracts people from different towns who wish to congregate and connect as a true family in Christ. Although it remains a small community, the church walks with joy and expectation.

future.title: The Future:
future.content: The congregation does not trust in its own strength, but in the biblical promise that sustains it: there is the conviction that God will continue to add daily to the church those who are being saved

history.cta: In the heart of our community
history.parallaxQuote: In the heart of our community

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: To guide each person to a deep relationship with God, grounded in His Word and supported by a community that walks in love.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To establish ourselves as a family of faith where each member grows spiritually and serves their neighbor with integrity.

items.name: Andrés Molina
items.description: Graduate in Pastoral Theology after four years at SEFOVAN seminary, he holds the international official certification from Southwestern Baptist Theological Seminary (Dallas, Texas). After serving in several churches in Barcelona, he moved to Xerta, where during the pandemic he started prayer meetings in his home due to the lack of a community with a biblical foundation. What began with family and neighbors grew until it was established in a location in Tortosa. Today, in 2026, he continues to guide the congregation with love, commitment, and dedication.

items.title: Love
items.description: We love God above all things and our neighbor as ourselves.

items.title: Community
items.description: We believe in the power of community and fellowship among believers.

items.title: Word
items.description: The Bible is our guide and authority in everything we do and teach.
